zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前比特币报价62622.06美元，价格稳居20日均线62008.84美元上方，短线多头仍占据主动。24小时振幅较小，显示市场进入整理阶段，但整体结构依然保持震荡偏强格局，上行动能尚未完全衰减。

从技术指标观察，MACD主线数值344.82，维持在相对高位，表明中期趋势仍偏向多头，不过由于Signal及RSI数据缺失，暂无法确认动能是否进一步增强。若后续成交量同步放大，则价格有望延续突破走势。

支撑方面，短线关注62470美元附近，其次为62000美元一线，与20日均线形成较强支撑区域；上方阻力首先位于62630美元附近，若有效突破，则有机会进一步挑战62850至63000美元区域，关注突破后的持续性。

操作策略方面，建议以顺势交易为主，等待价格有效突破阻力后择机跟进，或回踩62000至62470美元支撑区域企稳后分批布局。若跌破62000美元并放量，则需警惕短线调整加深，严格控制仓位并设置止损。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin continues to trade in a tight consolidation phase around 62,622, reflecting a market in short-term equilibrium after recent gains. Price action remains slightly positive on the day, with minimal volatility and a narrow range between 62,468 and 62,632. The structure suggests buyers are defending downside levels while momentum slows near intraday highs. Overall trend bias remains cautiously bullish above the 20-period SMA.

Momentum indicators present a mildly bullish but incomplete picture due to missing RSI and signal line data. The MACD reading at 344.82 indicates positive momentum continuation, suggesting buyers still hold short-term control. With price trading above the 20-period SMA at 62,008, the broader micro-trend supports upside stability. However, absence of full confirmation signals implies caution, as momentum strength cannot yet be fully validated.

Immediate support is forming near the lower bound of the current range at 62,468, with stronger structural support aligned to the 20-period SMA around 62,008. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 62,632, marking the recent intraday high. A decisive break above this level could open room toward 63,000 psychological resistance. Price remains range-bound, favoring mean reversion unless breakout volume increases significantly.

Trading strategy favors range-bound approaches, with dip buying near support levels and partial profit-taking near resistance. Conservative traders may wait for a confirmed breakout above 62,632 with volume expansion before targeting 63,000. Alternatively, failure to hold 62,468 could trigger a short-term pullback toward the 20-period SMA. Risk management remains essential, with tight stops recommended due to low volatility and compressed price structure.
